pulls.title: LOCMAF v0.3: genBox + full/delta header redesign
pulls.author: tobbee
pulls.body:
## What

Reworks the draft around a self-delimiting element sequence — zero or more `genBox` elements (any box outside `moof`: `styp`, `prft`, `emsg`, `uuid`, carried verbatim), exactly one full or delta `moof` header, then the raw `mdat` payload — and bumps `locmafVersion` to `"0.3"`.

## Highlights

- **Integer notation**: MOQT vi64 (Section 1.4.1) throughout; signed values as zigzag vi64. Full 32-bit `sample_flags` carried (compact 5-bit form dropped).
- **Canonical CMAF reconstruction** defined as a function of *effective values* (not wire presence), plus a canonical encoding for encode-side golden vectors. `saio` offsets are moof-relative, version 0; reconstructed boxes never need 64-bit sizes. CENC `senc`/`saiz`/`saio` reconstruction cross-checked against ISO/IEC 23001-7:2023 and Bento4.
- **Simpler DRM**: scheme-agnostic (`cbc1`/`cens` carried with explicit IVs); the cenc IV counter-prediction rule is dropped — per-sample IVs are always explicit; `cbcs` (constant IV) remains the only scheme-specific case.
- **Simpler timeline handling**: delta headers never carry an absolute `tfdtBaseMediaDecodeTime`; a BMDT discontinuity re-anchors with a mid-group full header. Parity exceptions drop from four to three.
- **Transport rules**: one subgroup per group, no datagram forwarding, delta state resets on gaps.
- **Catalog**: `locmaf` packaging is signaled in CMSF catalogs only, mirroring `cmaf`, with a conditional `locmafVersion` track field.
- **New informative section**: minimal self-framing for use outside MOQT (vi64 length-prefixed Objects) covering on-disk storage, LL-DASH, and LL-HLS parts.
- Consumption described generically via chunk and frame interfaces; single author, with Hugo Björs credited in the acknowledgments.
